- **Gate 1 – Environment:** Python/platf.es: - **Gate 1 – Entorno:** el contexto Python/plataforma es correcto (`env`).
- **Gate 1 – Environment:** Python/platf.it: - **Gate 1 – Ambiente:** il contesto Python/piattaforma è corretto (`env`).
- **Gate 1 – Environment:** Python/platf.fr: - **Gate 1 – Environnement :** le contexte Python/plateforme est correct (`env`).
- **Gate 1 – Environment:** Python/platf.pt-BR: - **Gate 1 – Ambiente:** o contexto Python/plataforma está correto (`env`).
- **Gate 1 – Environment:** Python/platf.zh-CN: - **Gate 1 – 环境：** Python/平台上下文正确（`env`）。
- **Gate 1 – Environment:** Python/platf.ja: - **Gate 1 – 環境:** Python/プラットフォームの文脈が正しい（`env`）。

- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.en: - **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseline model behavior is reproducible (`validate`).
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.es: - **Gate 2 – Solidez científica:** el comportamiento base del modelo es reproducible (`validate`).
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.it: - **Gate 2 – Solidità scientifica:** il comportamento baseline del modello è riproducibile (`validate`).
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.fr: - **Gate 2 – Rigueur scientifique :** le comportement de base du modèle est reproductible (`validate`).
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.pt-BR: - **Gate 2 – Sanidade científica:** o comportamento base do modelo é reproduzível (`validate`).
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.ru: - **Gate 2 – Научная валидность:** базовое поведение модели воспроизводимо (`validate`).
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.zh-CN: - **Gate 2 – 科学校验：** 基线模型行为可复现（`validate`）。
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.hi: - **Gate 2 – वैज्ञानिक सुदृढ़ता:** बेसलाइन मॉडल व्यवहार पुनरुत्पादित हो सकता है (`validate`)।
- **Gate 2 – Scientific sanity:** baseli.ja: - **Gate 2 – 科学的妥当性:** ベースラインモデル挙動は再現可能（`validate`）。

- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.en: - **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** market data + fallback chain are reachable (`preflight --market ALL`).
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.es: - **Gate 3 – Fiabilidad de fuentes:** datos de mercado + cadena fallback disponibles (`preflight --market ALL`).
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.it: - **Gate 3 – Affidabilità delle fonti:** dati di mercato + catena fallback raggiungibili (`preflight --market ALL`).
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.fr: - **Gate 3 – Fiabilité des sources :** données de marché + chaîne de fallback accessibles (`preflight --market ALL`).
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.pt-BR: - **Gate 3 – Confiabilidade de fonte:** dados de mercado + cadeia fallback acessíveis (`preflight --market ALL`).
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.ru: - **Gate 3 – Надёжность источников:** рыночные данные + fallback-цепочка доступны (`preflight --market ALL`).
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.zh-CN: - **Gate 3 – 来源可靠性：** 市场数据 + fallback 链可达（`preflight --market ALL`）。
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.hi: - **Gate 3 – स्रोत विश्वसनीयता:** मार्केट डेटा + fallback chain उपलब्ध हैं (`preflight --market ALL`)।
- **Gate 3 – Source reliability:** marke.ja: - **Gate 3 – ソース信頼性:** 市場データ + フォールバックチェーンに到達可能（`preflight --market ALL`）。

- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.en: - **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live loop runs with known input history (`live`).
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.es: - **Gate 4 – Ejecución runtime:** el bucle live corre con historial de entrada conocido (`live`).
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.it: - **Gate 4 – Esecuzione runtime:** il loop live gira con storico input noto (`live`).
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.fr: - **Gate 4 – Exécution runtime :** la boucle live tourne avec un historique d’entrée connu (`live`).
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.pt-BR: - **Gate 4 – Execução runtime:** o loop live roda com histórico de entrada conhecido (`live`).
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.ru: - **Gate 4 – Runtime-исполнение:** live-цикл работает с известной входной историей (`live`).
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.zh-CN: - **Gate 4 – Runtime 执行：** live 循环使用已知输入历史运行（`live`）。
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.hi: - **Gate 4 – रनटाइम निष्पादन:** live लूप ज्ञात इनपुट हिस्ट्री के साथ चलता है (`live`)।
- **Gate 4 – Runtime execution:** live l.ja: - **Gate 4 – ランタイム実行:** 既知の入力履歴で live ループが動作（`live`）。

- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.en: - **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** latency/failover targets hold under stress (`stress_test_suite.py`).
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.es: - **Gate 5 – Confianza adversarial:** objetivos de latencia/failover se mantienen bajo estrés (`stress_test_suite.py`).
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.it: - **Gate 5 – Fiducia avversariale:** i target latenza/failover reggono sotto stress (`stress_test_suite.py`).
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.fr: - **Gate 5 – Confiance adversariale :** les cibles latence/failover tiennent sous stress (`stress_test_suite.py`).
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.pt-BR: - **Gate 5 – Confiança adversarial:** metas de latência/failover se mantêm sob estresse (`stress_test_suite.py`).
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.ru: - **Gate 5 – Адверсариальная уверенность:** цели latency/failover выдерживаются под стрессом (`stress_test_suite.py`).
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.zh-CN: - **Gate 5 – 对抗置信度：** 延迟/故障切换目标在压力下可保持（`stress_test_suite.py`）。
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.hi: - **Gate 5 – एडवर्सेरियल भरोसा:** latency/failover लक्ष्य स्ट्रेस में टिकते हैं (`stress_test_suite.py`)।
- **Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence:** l.ja: - **Gate 5 – 敵対的信頼性:** latency/failover 目標がストレス下でも維持（`stress_test_suite.py`）。

- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.en: - **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell apps such as iSH / a-Shell. Termux-specific notification hooks are not available there.
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.es: - **iPhone (mejor esfuerzo):** usa apps shell como iSH / a-Shell. Los hooks de notificación específicos de Termux no están disponibles allí.
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.it: - **iPhone (best effort):** usa app shell come iSH / a-Shell. Gli hook di notifica specifici di Termux non sono disponibili lì.
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.fr: - **iPhone (best effort) :** utilisez des apps shell comme iSH / a-Shell. Les hooks de notification spécifiques à Termux n’y sont pas disponibles.
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.pt-BR: - **iPhone (best effort):** use apps de shell como iSH / a-Shell. Hooks de notificação específicos do Termux não estão disponíveis lá.
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.ru: - **iPhone (best effort):** используйте shell-приложения, такие как iSH / a-Shell. Специфичные для Termux хуки уведомлений там недоступны.
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.zh-CN: - **iPhone（尽力而为）：** 可使用 iSH / a-Shell 等 shell 应用。Termux 专用通知钩子在该平台不可用。
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.hi: - **iPhone (best effort):** iSH / a-Shell जैसे shell ऐप्स का उपयोग करें। Termux-विशिष्ट notification hooks वहाँ उपलब्ध नहीं हैं।
- **iPhone (best effort)**: use shell ap.ja: - **iPhone（ベストエフォート）:** iSH / a-Shell などのシェルアプリを使用。Termux 固有の通知フックは利用できません。

- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.es: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**: usa los mismos comandos CLI; ejecútalos vía tmux/scheduler/cron para persistencia.
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.it: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**: usa gli stessi comandi CLI; esegui via tmux/scheduler/cron per persistenza.
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.fr: - **Windows / Linux / macOS** : utilisez les mêmes commandes CLI ; exécutez via tmux/scheduler/cron pour la persistance.
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.pt-BR: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use os mesmos comandos CLI; execute via tmux/scheduler/cron para persistência.
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.ru: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**: используйте те же CLI-команды; запускайте через tmux/scheduler/cron для персистентности.
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.zh-CN: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**：使用同一套 CLI 命令；通过 tmux/scheduler/cron 保持持续运行。
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.hi: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**: वही CLI कमांड्स उपयोग करें; निरंतरता के लिए tmux/scheduler/cron से चलाएँ।
- **Windows / Linux / macOS**: use the s.ja: - **Windows / Linux / macOS**: 同じ CLI コマンドを使用し、永続運用には tmux/scheduler/cron 経由で実行します。

- Transfer entropy module for cross-mark.pt-BR: - Módulo de entropia de transferência para análise causal entre mercados.
- Transfer entropy module for cross-mark.ru: - Модуль transfer entropy для межрыночного каузального анализа.
- Transfer entropy module for cross-mark.zh-CN: - 用于跨市场因果分析的传递熵模块。

- Transfer entropy module for cross-mark.ja: - クロスマーケット因果分析のための Transfer Entropy モジュール。

- Optimizer with policy updates based on.en: - Optimizer with policy updates based on historical performance.
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.es: - Optimizador con actualizaciones de política basadas en rendimiento histórico.
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.it: - Ottimizzatore con aggiornamenti di policy basati sulle performance storiche.
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.fr: - Optimiseur avec mises à jour de policy basées sur la performance historique.
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.pt-BR: - Otimizador com atualizações de policy baseadas em desempenho histórico.
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.ru: - Оптимизатор с обновлениями policy на основе исторической производительности.
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.zh-CN: - 基于历史表现进行策略更新的优化器。
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.hi: - ऐतिहासिक प्रदर्शन के आधार पर policy अपडेट वाला ऑप्टिमाइज़र।
- Optimizer with policy updates based on.ja: - 履歴パフォーマンスに基づくポリシー更新付きオプティマイザ。

- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.en: - In complex, chaotic systems, early-warning signal is often hidden in the **micro-residual**: tiny deviations, weak correlations, almost-empty data points.
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.es: - En sistemas complejos y caóticos, la señal temprana suele ocultarse en el **micro-residual**: pequeñas desviaciones, correlaciones débiles y puntos casi vacíos.
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.it: - Nei sistemi complessi e caotici, il segnale di early-warning è spesso nascosto nel **micro-residual**: piccole deviazioni, correlazioni deboli e datapoint quasi vuoti.
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.fr: - Dans les systèmes complexes et chaotiques, le signal d’alerte précoce est souvent caché dans le **micro-résiduel** : petites déviations, corrélations faibles et points quasi vides.
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.pt-BR: - Em sistemas complexos e caóticos, o sinal de alerta precoce costuma ficar no **micro-residual**: desvios pequenos, correlações fracas e pontos quase vazios.
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.ru: - В сложных хаотических системах ранний сигнал часто скрыт в **micro-residual**: малых отклонениях, слабых корреляциях и почти пустых точках данных.
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.zh-CN: - 在复杂且混沌的系统中，早期预警信号常隐藏在 **微残差** 中：细微偏差、弱相关、近乎空白的数据点。
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.hi: - जटिल और कैओटिक सिस्टम में early-warning संकेत अक्सर **micro-residual** में छिपे होते हैं: सूक्ष्म विचलन, कमजोर सहसंबंध, लगभग-खाली डेटा पॉइंट्स।
- In complex, chaotic systems, early-war.ja: - 複雑でカオスな系では、早期警告シグナルはしばしば **micro-residual**（微小偏差・弱い相関・ほぼ空のデータ点）に隠れます。

- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.en: - TPM evaluates not only a value itself, but the **change of relationships over time, source quality, regime, and causal neighborhood**.
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.es: - TPM no evalúa solo el valor, sino también el **cambio de relaciones en el tiempo, la calidad de fuente, el régimen y el vecindario causal**.
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.it: - TPM valuta non solo il valore, ma anche il **cambiamento delle relazioni nel tempo, qualità fonte, regime e vicinato causale**.
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.fr: - TPM évalue non seulement une valeur, mais aussi le **changement des relations dans le temps, la qualité des sources, le régime et le voisinage causal**.
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.pt-BR: - O TPM avalia não só o valor em si, mas também a **mudança das relações ao longo do tempo, qualidade da fonte, regime e vizinhança causal**.
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.ru: - TPM оценивает не только само значение, но и **изменение связей во времени, качество источника, режим и каузальное соседство**.
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.zh-CN: - TPM 不仅评估单个数值，还评估**关系随时间变化、来源质量、状态区间与因果邻域**。
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.hi: - TPM केवल मान को नहीं, बल्कि **समय के साथ संबंधों का परिवर्तन, स्रोत गुणवत्ता, रेजीम और causal neighborhood** भी आकलित करता है।
- TPM evaluates not only a value itself,.ja: - TPM は値そのものだけでなく、**時間的関係変化・ソース品質・レジーム・因果近傍**も評価します。

Important correctness note: TPM does **n.en: Important correctness note: TPM does **not** magically predict the future. It aims for **earlier probabilistic detection** of regime shifts, breakouts, and disruptions — when data quality and validation gates are satisfied.
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.es: Nota de corrección importante: TPM **no** predice mágicamente el futuro. Busca **detección probabilística temprana** de cambios de régimen, breakouts y disrupciones, cuando se cumplen calidad de datos y gates de validación.
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.it: Nota importante di correttezza: TPM **non** predice magicamente il futuro. Mira a una **rilevazione probabilistica anticipata** di cambi regime, breakout e disruption, quando qualità dati e gate di validazione sono soddisfatti.
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.fr: Note importante : TPM **ne** prédit pas magiquement le futur. Il vise une **détection probabiliste plus précoce** des changements de régime, breakouts et disruptions lorsque qualité des données et gates de validation sont respectés.
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.pt-BR: Nota importante: o TPM **não** prevê o futuro magicamente. Ele busca **detecção probabilística antecipada** de mudanças de regime, breakouts e disrupções quando qualidade de dados e gates de validação são atendidos.
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.ru: Важное уточнение: TPM **не** предсказывает будущее магически. Цель — **более раннее вероятностное обнаружение** смены режимов, пробоев и сбоев при соблюдении качества данных и validation-gates.
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.zh-CN: 重要说明：TPM **并不**会“神奇预测未来”。其目标是在数据质量与验证 gate 满足时，实现对状态切换、突破和扰动的**更早期概率检测**。
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.hi: महत्वपूर्ण स्पष्टता: TPM भविष्य की **जादुई** भविष्यवाणी नहीं करता। इसका लक्ष्य डेटा गुणवत्ता और validation gates पूरे होने पर रेजीम बदलाव, breakout और disruption की **पहले से संभाव्य पहचान** है।
Important correctness note: TPM does **n.ja: 重要な正確性メモ：TPM は未来を魔法のように予測**しません**。データ品質と検証ゲートが満たされる場合に、レジーム変化・ブレイクアウト・破綻の**より早い確率的検知**を目指します。

- Every profession can be modeled as a \.en: - Every profession can be modeled as a "market" with domain-specific features, nodes, correlations, and anomalies
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.es: - Cada profesión puede modelarse como un "mercado" con rasgos de dominio, nodos, correlaciones y anomalías
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.it: - Ogni professione può essere modellata come un "mercato" con feature di dominio, nodi, correlazioni e anomalie
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.fr: - Chaque profession peut être modélisée comme un "marché" avec ses variables, nœuds, corrélations et anomalies
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.pt-BR: - Cada profissão pode ser modelada como um "mercado" com atributos de domínio, nós, correlações e anomalias
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.ru: - Каждую профессию можно моделировать как "рынок" со специфичными признаками, узлами, корреляциями и аномалиями
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.zh-CN: - 每个职业都可建模为一个"市场"：含领域特征、节点、相关性与异常
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.hi: - प्रत्येक पेशे को डोमेन-विशिष्ट फीचर्स, नोड्स, सहसंबंध और एनॉमलीज़ वाले "मार्केट" की तरह मॉडल किया जा सकता है
- Every profession can be modeled as a \.ja: - すべての職種は、ドメイン固有特徴・ノード・相関・異常を持つ"市場"としてモデル化可能

A clean bootstrap for an autonomous mult.en: A clean bootstrap for an autonomous multi-agent setup (BTC, COFFEE, and more) with cross-platform runtime options.

production/preflight_manager.py – resili.en: production/preflight_manager.py – resilient market source probing with Alpha Vantage + fallback chain and local cache fallback.

production/tpm_live_monitor.py – live BT.en: production/tpm_live_monitor.py – live BTC monitor with optional CSV warm-start and Termux notifications.

core/scout.py, core/reserve_manager.py,.en: core/scout.py, core/reserve_manager.py, core/init_db_v2.py – operational core tooling.

python scripts/tpm_cli.py update check.en: python scripts/tpm_cli.py update check  # may return phase=check_error if remote is unreachable

The updater performs: graceful shutdown.en: The updater performs: graceful shutdown → maintenance mode → backup → git update → restore-ready state.

The web hub now also exposes health prob.en: The web hub now also exposes health probes: GET /api/health and GET /api/ready for ops/runtime checks.

/api/ready performs writable-state and s.en: /api/ready performs writable-state and snapshot-freshness checks (configurable via WEB_HUB_SNAPSHOT_MAX_AGE_SEC).

After successful update, the cockpit can.en: After successful update, the cockpit can hand over directly to the main Web Hub port ("IrsanAI - TPM Agenten starten").

Update cockpit (same feature scope in Do.en: Update cockpit (same feature scope in Docker + Termux):

Platform expansion roadmap (Linux/macOS/.en: Platform expansion roadmap (Linux/macOS/iPhone + parity tracking): docs/roadmap/platform_parity.md.

The default repo flow is intentionally l.en: The default repo flow is intentionally linear to avoid hidden-state drift and "false confidence" during live runs.

Gate 1 – Environment: Python/platform co.en: Gate 1 – Environment: Python/platform context is correct (env).

Gate 2 – Scientific sanity: baseline mod.en: Gate 2 – Scientific sanity: baseline model behavior is reproducible (validate).

Gate 3 – Source reliability: market data.en: Gate 3 – Source reliability: market data + fallback chain are reachable (preflight --market ALL).

Gate 4 – Runtime execution: live loop ru.en: Gate 4 – Runtime execution: live loop runs with known input history (live).

Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence: latency.en: Gate 5 – Adversarial confidence: latency/failover targets hold under stress (stress_test_suite.py).

✅ Already fixed in code: CLI preflight n.en: ✅ Already fixed in code: CLI preflight now supports --market ALL, matching quickstart + docker flow.

You are X? Click your lane. Start in <60.en: You are X? Click your lane. Start in <60 seconds.

If you do only one thing, run this and i.en: If you do only one thing, run this and inspect the report output:

If this lane convinces you, the rest of.en: If this lane convinces you, the rest of the repository will likely resonate too.

This command auto-checks/install require.en: This command auto-checks/install required tools, clones/pulls the repo, runs the installer and opens the web install cockpit.

For direct Android (Termux) web UI demo,.en: For direct Android (Termux) web UI demo, start Forge runtime locally:

The script auto-opens browser (if availa.en: The script auto-opens browser (if available) and keeps service running in background.

If you saw a pydantic-core/Rust or scipy.en: If you saw a pydantic-core/Rust or scipy/Fortran build error on Android, use

python -m pip install -r requirements-te.en: python -m pip install -r requirements-termux.txt (Termux-safe set, no Rust toolchain required).

If numpy/cmake/patchelf builds fail on A.en: If numpy/cmake/patchelf builds fail on Android, install NumPy from Termux first and avoid source-build wheel paths:

pkg install -y python-numpy && python -m.en: pkg install -y python-numpy && python -m pip install --no-build-isolation --no-cache-dir -r requirements-termux.txt.

In the web interface you can control run.en: In the web interface you can control runtime start/stop; a progress bar shows transition status.

iPhone (best effort): use shell apps suc.en: iPhone (best effort): use shell apps such as iSH / a-Shell. Termux-specific notification hooks are not available there.

Windows / Linux / macOS: use the same CL.en: Windows / Linux / macOS: use the same CLI commands; run via tmux/scheduler/cron for persistence.

Use Docker in this exact order (no guess.en: Use Docker in this exact order (no guessing):

Now open http://localhost:8787 in your b.en: Now open http://localhost:8787 in your browser (not http://0.0.0.0:8787). Uvicorn binds to 0.0.0.0 internally, but clients should use localhost (or the host LAN IP).

tpm-live = terminal live-monitor logs (C.en: tpm-live = terminal live-monitor logs (CLI output only, no web UI).

tpm-forge-web = FastAPI + dashboard UI (.en: tpm-forge-web = FastAPI + dashboard UI (the one with layout/progress/runtime control).

If tpm-preflight reports ALPHAVANTAGE_KE.en: If tpm-preflight reports ALPHAVANTAGE_KEY not set, COFFEE still works via fallbacks.

If you previously saw sqlite3.Operationa.en: If you previously saw sqlite3.OperationalError: no such table: price_history in optional Step 3, update to the latest repo state. Preflight now auto-initializes DB schema before probing sources in CLI and runtime paths.

if needed, restart only web service: doc.en: if needed, restart only web service: docker compose restart tpm-forge-web

Forge live cockpit now exposes per-marke.en: Forge live cockpit now exposes per-market short-horizon outlook (up/down/sideways) with confidence in /api/markets/live.

When a market glitch is detected (accele.en: When a market glitch is detected (acceleration spike), runtime can trigger:

optional Telegram push (if bot token/cha.en: optional Telegram push (if bot token/chat id configured in config/config.yaml).

Configure in dashboard via Save Alerts /.en: Configure in dashboard via Save Alerts / Test Alert or API:

Alpha Vantage first for COFFEE (when ALP.en: Alpha Vantage first for COFFEE (when ALPHAVANTAGE_KEY is set)

Production Forge web runtime is availabl.en: Production Forge web runtime is available (production.forge_runtime:app).

Finance-first start configuration uses B.en: Finance-first start configuration uses BTC + COFFEE.

Live frame, agent fitness, transfer entr.en: Live frame, agent fitness, transfer entropy, and domain summary are visible in the web dashboard.

Users can add new market agents at runti.en: Users can add new market agents at runtime (POST /api/agents).

Real-data benchmarking with explicit acc.en: Real-data benchmarking with explicit acceptance thresholds (precision/recall/FPR/drift).

Strict reflexive governance rules for au.en: Strict reflexive governance rules for auto safe-mode.

Collective-memory workflow for versioned.en: Collective-memory workflow for versioned per-domain learning patterns.

Regime-based policy orchestrator (trend/.en: Regime-based policy orchestrator (trend/shock/sideways) across all agents.

One non-finance domain pilot (e.g. medic.en: One non-finance domain pilot (e.g. medical or seismic) with explicit data contracts.

Windows: Forge runtime + web interface +.en: Windows: Forge runtime + web interface + Docker/PowerShell/click-start are operational.

Smartphone: Android/Termux live-monitori.en: Smartphone: Android/Termux live-monitoring is operational; web UI is responsive on mobile.

Realtime multi-agent: BTC + COFFEE activ.en: Realtime multi-agent: BTC + COFFEE active by default; additional markets can be added dynamically in the web UI.

Source boundary rule: if requested marke.en: Source boundary rule: if requested market is not covered by built-in sources, provide explicit source URL + authorization data.

Yes, this has already started in the rep.en: Yes, this has already started in the repo and is now extended:

Starts by default with one finance TPM a.en: Starts by default with one finance TPM agent for BTC and one for COFFEE.

Users can add more markets/agents direct.en: Users can add more markets/agents directly from the web UI (/api/agents).

Runs as a persistent runtime service wit.en: Runs as a persistent runtime service with live frame output (/api/frame) for immersive insight.

Transfer entropy module for cross-market.en: Transfer entropy module for cross-market causal analysis.

Optimizer with policy updates based on h.en: Optimizer with policy updates based on historical performance.

Working hypothesis of the TPM core:.en: Working hypothesis of the TPM core:

In complex, chaotic systems, early-warni.en: In complex, chaotic systems, early-warning signal is often hidden in the micro-residual: tiny deviations, weak correlations, almost-empty data points.

Where classic systems see only 0 or \"no.en: Where classic systems see only 0 or "not enough relevance", TPM searches for structured anomalies (glitch patterns) in context flow.

TPM evaluates not only a value itself, b.en: TPM evaluates not only a value itself, but the change of relationships over time, source quality, regime, and causal neighborhood.

Important correctness note: TPM does not.en: Important correctness note: TPM does not magically predict the future. It aims for earlier probabilistic detection of regime shifts, breakouts, and disruptions — when data quality and validation gates are satisfied.

If TPM can detect weak precursor pattern.en: If TPM can detect weak precursor patterns in financial instruments (index/ticker/ISIN-like identifiers, liquidity, microstructure), the same principle can generalize to many domains:

Event/sensor stream + context model + an.en: Event/sensor stream + context model + anomaly layer + feedback loop

Every profession can be modeled as a \"m.en: Every profession can be modeled as a "market" with domain-specific features, nodes, correlations, and anomalies

Specialized TPM agents can learn across.en: Specialized TPM agents can learn across domains while preserving local professional logic and ethics

To keep the list logically correct acros.en: To keep the list logically correct across regions, TPM role-mapping should be interpreted as functional equivalents, not literal job-title translation:

Germany ↔ US/UK: Polizei vs split functi.en: Germany ↔ US/UK: Polizei vs split functions (Police Department, Sheriff, State Trooper) and prosecution differences (Staatsanwaltschaft vs District Attorney/Crown Prosecution).

Spain / Italy: civil-law structures with.en: Spain / Italy: civil-law structures with distinct court and policing workflows; data pipelines often split between regional and national systems.

Bosnia and Herzegovina: multi-entity gov.en: Bosnia and Herzegovina: multi-entity governance means fragmented data ownership; TPM benefits from federated anomaly fusion.

Russia / China: role definitions and dat.en: Russia / China: role definitions and data-governance constraints differ; TPM must be configured with local compliance boundaries and institutional equivalents.

Additional high-impact regions: France,.en: Additional high-impact regions: France, Brazil, India, Japan, MENA states, and Sub-Saharan Africa can be onboarded by mapping equivalent functions and available telemetry.

From tool to epistemic infrastructure: d.en: From tool to epistemic infrastructure: domains operationalize "weak early knowledge".

From isolated systems to agent federatio.en: From isolated systems to agent federations: local ethics + shared anomaly grammar.

From reactive response to anticipatory g.en: From reactive response to anticipatory governance: prevention over late crisis control.

From static models to living theories: c.en: From static models to living theories: continuous recalibration under real-world shocks.

Core idea: a responsibly governed TPM cl.en: Core idea: a responsibly governed TPM cluster cannot control chaos — but it can help institutions understand it earlier, steer it more robustly, and decide more humanely.

Dieses Dokument ist ab sofort Referenz f.en: Dieses Dokument ist ab sofort Referenz für:

To ensure no language community is conte.en: To ensure no language community is content-disadvantaged, i18n files are now maintained in full canonical parity with README.md.

Was aus meiner Sicht noch offen ist (fac.en: Was aus meiner Sicht noch offen ist (fachlich, nicht technisch blockiert):

Reflexive Governance (automatisch konser.en: Reflexive Governance (automatisch konservativer Modus bei Unsicherheit)

Kurzfazit: Die früheren „Next Steps“ sin.en: Kurzfazit: Die früheren „Next Steps“ sind technisch zu großen Teilen gestartet oder umgesetzt; der größte Hebel liegt jetzt in fachlicher Operationalisierung (Governance, Policies, Domänenlogik, Realdaten-Evidenz) und konsistentem Doku-/i18n-Betrieb.

For implementation sequencing, done-crit.en: For implementation sequencing, done-criteria and evidence gates for each open LOP point, see:

1. P1 Realdaten-Evidenz ausbauen: Benchm.en: 1. P1 Realdaten-Evidenz ausbauen: Benchmarking mit festen Akzeptanzkriterien (Precision/Recall/FPR/Drift).

2. P2 Reflexive Governance finalisieren:.en: 2. P2 Reflexive Governance finalisieren: harte Auto-Safe-Mode-Regeln bei Unsicherheit definieren.

3. P3 Collective Memory standardisieren:.en: 3. P3 Collective Memory standardisieren: versionssichere Lernmuster inkl. Review-Prozess je Domäne.

4. P4 Web-Immersion weiter ausrollen: Ro.en: 4. P4 Web-Immersion weiter ausrollen: Rollenansichten für weitere TPM-Branchen auf Basis des neuen responsiven Layouts.

Plattform-Hinweis: Aktuell primär auf Wi.en: Plattform-Hinweis: Aktuell primär auf Windows + Smartphone ausgerichtet. Später am Ende der LOP ergänzen: macOS, Linux und weitere Plattformprofile.
